ucdxml:block.title: Seal data
ucdxml:block.edit:
code-point-attributes &= attribute kSEAL_CCZSrc { xsd:string { pattern="C-\d{5}" } }?
code-point-attributes &= attribute kSEAL_DYCSrc { xsd:string { pattern="D-\d{5}" } }?
code-point-attributes &= attribute kSEAL_MCJK { xsd:string { pattern="[0-9A-F]{4,5}" } }?
code-point-attributes &= attribute kSEAL_QJZSrc { xsd:string { pattern="K-\d{5}" } }?
code-point-attributes &= attribute kSEAL_Rad { list { xsd:string { pattern="\d{1,3}\.[A-F0-9]{4,5}" }+ } }?
code-point-attributes &= attribute kSEAL_THXSrc { xsd:string { pattern="TH-(\d{5}|X\d{3}|Y\d{3})" } }?
